name: Revo Uninstaller
categoryDescription: Configuration and artifacts from third-party software — archive tools, cleanup utilities, development tools, and legacy applications.
description: Revo Uninstaller Pro configuration and uninstall history.
forensic_value: Reveals software that was uninstalled using Revo — which performs deep removal including registry keys. An attacker using Revo to clean up after themselves may leave traces here while removing evidence from standard Uninstall keys.
